title: Candidate Reactivation Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Candidate Reactivation Tools, helping staffing agencies reengage dormant candidates.
content:
Candidate Reactivation Overview

Candidate reactivation is important for staffing agencies to reengage dormant candidates. Staffing agencies need reactivation tools including candidate identification, outreach automation, engagement tracking. Candidate reactivation tools help agencies achieve candidate identification, automated outreach, engagement management.

The core value of reactivation tools lies in improving reactivation efficiency by 60%, enhancing candidate identification by 70%, optimizing engagement tracking by 50%.

Reactivation Platform Reviews

Bullhorn Reactivation

Bullhorn provides CRM-integrated reactivation features. Candidate identification features identify dormant candidates. Automated outreach features automate reactivation outreach. Engagement tracking features track engagement progress.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting candidate reactivation tools should focus on candidate identification, automated outreach, engagement tracking, and cost structure matching reactivation volume.
author: Reactivation Research Institute
